transformationMoves: Replace portable nouns with sourced Stratholme infrastructure and material culture.
Translate abstract plague logic into streets, gates, carts, ovens, ledgers, and loading order.
Use action beats around dialogue to show tactic, status, and environment instead of letting speech float.
Filter every added detail through Jaina's pressure-driven pattern read and field-use mindset.
Bind scene exits to tactile world anchors rather than abstract realization.

scenes.title: The Ride
scenes.biggestGap: The ride already has pressure, but the outer farming belt and gate approach need tighter Stratholme-specific logistics so the opening cannot belong to any city.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: North road into Stratholme's outer farming belt and warehouse-side service approach.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Bit foam, ditch grass, flour-dusted traffic, wagon axles, and gate hardware.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads the city as delivery order, oven heat, and shrinking time rather than as skyline.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Riding distance, fork choices, smoke lines, and gate traffic keep the saddle briefing physical.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Flour in the threshold cracks and loading doors of the first store pull the chapter off the road and into the work.

scenes.title: The First Stores
scenes.biggestGap: The granary win lands, but the middle needs stronger district texture and route-specific aftermath so success, spillover, and handler escalation do not blur together.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Service-gate warehouse district feeding Market Row, church kitchens, and household tables.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Burlap, grey meal, clerk's map sheet, whistle at the ramp, cloth over warm rolls.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina keeps converting magical pull into distribution math: what is still in sacks, what already moved, what now lives in bodies.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Questions are tied to ledgers, routes, cart loads, and the bodies holding lanes around her.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Warm bread in hands, chapel-grey novices, and open shutters make the late count physical before the return ride.

scenes.title: The Count
scenes.biggestGap: The gate exchange already hits, but the final third needs the main gate, chapel bells, and Uther's city-specific weight to keep the ending from turning into portable command dialogue.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Southern main gate under Stratholme's iron crest with the city and chapel bells behind the answer.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Sweating tack, gate stone, churned mud, flour dust, and ash.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina's decisive shift is from counting nodes to counting mouths already fed.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Falric under the arch, Arthas stepping down through mud, and Uther's silence beside the gate keep the answer embodied.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Jaina finishes with the city at her back and ruined grain still on her hands.
